creator: uffe@uffe.org
text:
Seen on the package version of lua-5.1.4_1

/usr/local/man/man1/lua-5.1.1.gz
/usr/local/man/man1/luac-5.1.1.gz

This naming makes it impossible to use these man pages

The file naming should have been like this:


/usr/local/man/man1/lua.1.gz
/usr/local/man/man1/luac.1.gz
